name: price-stock-monitor-amazon-ebay-newegg-shopify
title: Amazon, eBay, Newegg & Shopify Price & Stock Monitor
description: Monitor product prices and stock on Amazon, eBay, Newegg, and Shopify stores. Track changes between scheduled runs, build price history, and trigger alerts on price drops or restocks. Playwright-powered scraping with US residential proxy support.
